info.title: JAPDP API
info.description: Jablonsky Data Platform — structural engineering data services

get.summary: Health Check
get.description: Basic health check endpoint.

schema.title: Response Health Check Api Health Get

get.summary: List Projects
get.description: List all projects grouped by Number.

schema.title: Response List Projects Api Projects Get

get.summary: Get Project
get.description: Get full detail for a project number.

patch.description: Update project metadata (writes to management.project_meta only).

delete.description: Delete all files for a project number (cascade) + project_meta.
Delete a single file (cascade). If last file, also deletes project_meta.

post.description:
Merge source project into this one (target).

Reassigns design records from source to target, then deletes source.

get.summary: Get Load Table
get.description: Get all load table entries for a file.

schema.title: Response Get Load Table Api Projects Files  File Id  Load Table Get

post.description:
Bulk create/replace load table entries for a file.

Replaces ALL existing entries. Clears any dependent computation
results (load_areas, tributary_results, load_assignments, rundown)
since they reference the old load_table entries.

schema.title: Response Bulk Replace Load Table Api Projects Files  File Id  Load Table Post

patch.description: Update a single load table entry.

delete.description:
Delete a single load table entry.

Clears dependent computation results for this entry first.

post.description:
Compute Voronoi tributary areas.

Optionally intersects with user-drawn load areas and writes
tributary_results + load_assignments to the design schema.

get.summary: Get Tributary Results
get.description: Get stored tributary results for a project/level.

schema.title: Response Get Tributary Results Api Tributary Results  Project Id   Level Id  Get

get.summary: Get Tributary Assignments
get.description: Get stored load assignments for a project/level.

schema.title: Response Get Tributary Assignments Api Tributary Assignments  Project Id   Level Id  Get

get.summary: Download Tributary Json
get.description:
Download tributary results as JSON for Dynamo/external tools.

Returns a JSON file keyed by element_guid with surface coordinates,
centroid, load table ids, and descriptive text.

get.summary: Get Level Elements
get.description: Return all renderable elements for a file + level pair.

post.description:
Sync level_identity from Revit (dbo.Levels).

Unified populate + stale detection. Stale levels with linked
rundown/ETABS data are preserved; unlinked stale levels are auto-deleted.

get.summary: Get Level Identities
get.description: Get all level identity rows. Auto-syncs if dbo has changed.

schema.title: Response Get Level Identities Api Projects  Number  Levels Identity Get

patch.description: Update a single level identity row (canonical_name, sort_order, rundown_name, etabs_name).

post.description:
Sync element_identity from Revit (dbo.Columns + dbo.Walls).

Unified populate + stale detection. Stale elements with linked
rundown/ETABS data are preserved; unlinked stale elements are auto-deleted.

get.summary: Get Element Stats
get.description: Return element identity counts by type, confidence bands, and errors.

get.summary: Get Element Identities
get.description: Get element identity rows. Auto-syncs if dbo has changed.

schema.title: Response Get Element Identities Api Projects  Number  Elements Identity Get

patch.description: Update a single element identity row.

post.summary: Parse rundown spreadsheet — preview only, no DB write
post.description:
Upload a .xlsm rundown spreadsheet.

Parses the file, runs engine recomputation, and returns a preview showing:
- Element count, level count, load type count
- Parse errors / warnings
- Discrepancies between engine-computed values and Excel-stored values

Does NOT write to the database. Call `/upload/confirm` to store results.
Project need not exist yet — upload is the onboarding path.

post.summary: Compute rundown from spreadsheet and store all results to DB
post.description:
Re-parse the .xlsm file, compute all floor results, and store to DB.

Replaces any existing rundown rows for this project number.
Returns computation statistics and validation summary.
Creates a project_meta entry if the project doesn't exist yet.

post.summary: Upload DXF files with level/load type config, compute and store rundown
post.description:
Upload DXF files with user-provided level pairs, file-level mapping,
and load type definitions. Parses all DXFs, builds RundownInput,
computes full rundown, and stores results to DB.

Form fields (JSON strings):
  - file_level_map: [{filename, bot_level, top_level}]
  - level_pairs: [{bot, top, height_m, concrete_mpa}]
  - load_types: [{code, description, dead_kpa, live_kpa, llrf_type}]
  - cladding_kpa: default cladding kPa (float)

get.summary: List projects with computed rundown data
get.description: Return a summary of projects that have rundown results, most recent first.

delete.summary: Delete all rundown data for a project
delete.description:
Delete rundown-specific data for a project.

Removes: design.rundown rows, design.rundown_transfers, and
rundown-uploaded load_tables (project_id=0).
Does NOT delete project_meta (shared by 14 FK references) or
identity tables (shared with Revit).

get.summary: List all rundown elements for a project
get.description:
Return a summary of all elements computed for this project.

Each element shows floor count and cumulative DL/LL/PF at the lowest floor.

get.summary: Get load types stored for a rundown project
get.description: Return load types from design.load_tables for this project (project_id=0).

schema.title: Response Get Rundown Load Types Api Projects  Number  Rundown Load Types Get

post.summary: Replace all load types for a rundown project
post.description:
Replace rundown load types (project_id=0) with user-provided entries.

Deletes existing rundown load types and inserts the new set.
Does not affect Revit-path load tables (project_id != 0).

get.summary: Get area balance and transfer validation results
get.description:
Re-run validation on stored rundown results.

Returns area balance checks, transfer checks, data gap warnings, and errors.
An empty result (no rows) returns is_valid=False with an error message.

get.summary: Cross-element summary matrix (levels × elements, selectable metric)
get.description:
Return a pivot table: levels on columns, elements on rows.

Valid metrics: DL, LL, PW, PF, F / A, % Steel, As, AREA, XFER AREA, CUM AREA.

patch.summary: Edit rebar fields on a single rundown row
patch.description:
Update bar_size, qty, n_bars, c_bars with engine recomputation.

Override flags control which values are user-set vs auto-computed.
Returns the updated rebar fields after recomputation.

get.summary: Get all transfer definitions for a project
get.description: Return all transfer definitions (source → target at level, percent).

schema.title: Response List Transfers Api Projects  Number  Rundown Transfers Get

get.summary: Get transfer definitions for one element
get.description: Return transfer definitions received by one element, with source DL/LL/CUM AREA.

schema.title: Response Get Element Transfers Api Projects  Number  Rundown Transfers  Mark  Get

put.summary: Replace all transfers for one element
put.description: Replace transfer definitions for one element. Does NOT recompute.

post.summary: Recompute entire project from stored data + transfer definitions
post.description: Re-run the engine on stored floor data with current transfer definitions.

get.summary: Export rundown data pack for VBA import
get.description: Generate a data pack .xlsx for VBA ImportFromPlatform macro.

get.summary: Get full floor-by-floor detail for one element
get.description:
Return complete floor-by-floor FloorResult data for one element.

Every intermediate value (DL breakdown, LL breakdown, areas, rebar) is included.

post.summary: Build vertical chains from identity hub

get.summary: List all vertical chains for a project

schema.title: Response List Chains Api Projects  Number  Chains Get

get.summary: Get full chain detail for one element
